presentation.title: AI Workbench Local — Policy / Contract Comparison
presentation.subtitle: Executive comparison review of grounded document differences
presentation.author: AI Workbench Local

executive_summary:
- The Access Review Evidence Log is a synthetic test artifact used to simulate incomplete evidence in a pilot review, while the Privileged Account Approval Email documents an actual governance action with enforceable compliance controls.  
- The Evidence Log highlights gaps in control closure due to missing provenance, whereas the Email specifies active access granted under defined operational and audit requirements.  
- Evidence Log is not a real compliance record but a testing tool; the Email is a formal governance artifact requiring archiving and revalidation.  
- The Evidence Log involves unresolved evidence items, while the Email mandates ongoing vendor and personnel verification for access continuity.  
- The Evidence Log’s purpose is to test process readiness; the Email operationalizes access controls within a compliance framework.  
- Control closure in the Evidence Log depends on provenance verification; compliance in the Email depends on sustained governance and audit readiness.
key_highlights: The Access Review Evidence Log is a synthetic test artifact used to simulate incomplete evidence in a pilot review, while the Privileged Account Approval Email documents an actual governance action with enforceable compliance controls.
The Evidence Log highlights gaps in control closure due to missing provenance, whereas the Email specifies active access granted under defined operational and audit requirements.
Evidence Log is not a real compliance record but a testing tool; the Email is a formal governance artifact requiring archiving and revalidation.
The Evidence Log involves unresolved evidence items, while the Email mandates ongoing vendor and personnel verification for access continuity.
The Evidence Log’s purpose is to test process readiness; the Email operationalizes access controls within a compliance framework.
Control closure in the Evidence Log depends on provenance verification; compliance in the Email depends on sustained governance and audit readiness.
